subject: Re: ts_import selection criteria got nothing.
body:
Hi Shanmukha,
Here is where your error is coming up - it does what the error message suggests and only gets there if it finds the associated xml files so I’m fairly sure your selection statuses must be off or some earlier processing failed.
Cheers,
Alister
warp/WarpTools/Commands/Tiltseries/ImportTiltseries.cs at 37d0ae33353d9bb5b0d82fd1ae37bdbb2c38c2fa · warpem/warp
github.com
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jun 5, 2025, at 16:16, 'Shanmukha Vamshi Kuruba' via Warp <warp-em@googlegroups.com> wrote:
﻿Hi Alister,
Thank you so much for the quick response. I’ve tried both approaches you suggested, but I’m still running into the same issue. https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1uySdQyIO3qzTjrV_IEiNItrQfWV4rd6r?usp=sharing  contains my .eer and mdoc files for reference could you please take a look and let me know if I might be missing something?
Thanks again for your help!
Best regards,
Shanmukha
On Tuesday, June 3, 2025 at 5:08:15 PM UTC-7 alist...@gmail.com wrote:
Hi Shanmukha,
two possibilities
- your tilts got deactivated at some point in earlier processing, see 
https://warpem.github.io/warp/reference/warptools/api/general/#change_selection
 for how to fix
- the filenames in your mdocs don't match the names of your eer files
Good luck!
Cheers,
Alister
On Tue, 3 Jun 2025 at 13:54, 'Shanmukha Vamshi Kuruba' via Warp <
war...@googlegroups.com
> wrote:
I'm trying to reconstruct a tomogram for tilt series from .eer files. When I run the following command, It doesn't generate a .tomostar file. I have checked the max tilt angle and  masker fraction and they are well within the limits. 
Any Idea what could be causing the problem? I would appreciate any help.
Here is the Output:
Running command ts_import with:
mdocs = frames/
pattern = *.mdoc
frameseries = warp_frameseries
tilt_exposure = 3.46
dont_invert = True
override_axis = null
auto_zero = False
tilt_offset = null
max_tilt = 90
min_intensity = 0
max_mask = 1
min_ntilts = 1
output = tomostar
Found 34 MDOC files, searching for *.mdoc in /data/Shan/tomo_reconstruct/frames/
Looking for frame series...
